title: Poker Cards Overhaul
description: Adds Poker Cards by simple renaming paper
body:
# **Adds full deck of Poker Cards**
To get them simply rename paper on anvil!
Also can be placed in Item Frame for better look!

Very Fun To play with Friends!
You can play various games with it!

For it to work you need Cit mod or Optifine or you need to play on newest snapshot!
![Some of the cards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6ba7400eb4fcb83b461a46066aa3310d9c76734.png)

> It is unofficial port to new versions of old poker cards resourcepack
> with many bug fixes, texture/model fixes, renaming bug fixes, and others
